testcase.name: test_ai_operations_basic_message
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_operations.py:79: in test_ai_operations_basic_message assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed with {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed with 502: {"detail":"AI service error: Error code: 429 - {'error': {'message': 'Rate limit reached for model `llama-3.3-70b-versatile` in organization `org_01khwd7gszeapajsmfvzgfkckg` service tier `on_demand` on tokens per day (TPD): Limit 100000, Used 99761, Requested 6546. Please try again in 1h30m49.248s. Need more tokens? Upgrade to Dev Tier today at https://console.groq.com/settings/billing', 'type': 'tokens', 'code': 'rate_limit_exceeded'}}"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_empty_message

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 502 assert 502 in [200, 400, 422] + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_operations.py:315: in test_empty_message assert response.status_code in [200, 400, 422], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 502 E assert 502 in [200, 400, 422] E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_long_message

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status for long message: 502 assert 502 in [200, 400, 413] + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_operations.py:330: in test_long_message assert response.status_code in [200, 400, 413], f"Unexpected status for long message: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status for long message: 502 E assert 502 in [200, 400, 413] E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_with_context
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_operations.py:348: in test_with_context assert response.status_code == 200, f"Context request failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Context request failed: {"detail":"AI service error: Error code: 429 - {'error': {'message': 'Rate limit reached for model `llama-3.3-70b-versatile` in organization `org_01khwd7gszeapajsmfvzgfkckg` service tier `on_demand` on tokens per day (TPD): Limit 100000, Used 99757, Requested 6562. Please try again in 1h30m59.616s. Need more tokens? Upgrade to Dev Tier today at https://console.groq.com/settings/billing', 'type': 'tokens', 'code': 'rate_limit_exceeded'}}"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_full_operator_flow
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_operations.py:365: in test_full_operator_flow assert r1.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
